description: Taxonomy, price benchmarks, and risk thresholds for the moving-services negotiation market.

household_size.label: Household size
household_size.description: Approximate volume driver for the move.

origin_zip.label: Origin ZIP
origin_zip.description: Pickup postal code, drives labor market rate and distance.

destination_zip.label: Destination ZIP
destination_zip.description: Drop-off postal code, drives distance and fuel.

inventory_items.label: Inventory items
inventory_items.description: Named heavy/bulky items that add crew time and risk surcharges.

stair_flights.label: Stair flights
stair_flights.description: Total flights of stairs across origin and destination (no elevator).

fair_market_band.description: A fair binding quote is expected to fall within [low, high] * computed_benchmark.

risk_controls.red_flag_description: If a mover drops more than 30% from its own opening quote, treat the opener as a padded lowball / bait price and flag it for the buyer.
risk_controls.minimum_binding_notice: Any quote given verbally must be confirmable as a written binding estimate before it counts as competitive leverage.
